dataCollection.purpose: Resolve city information for scenic spots and generate city exploration statistics.
dataCollection.scope: Approximate and precise location while app is in use.
dataCollection.storage: Stored locally on device in harmonyexplore.db.

dataCollection.purpose: Allow users to attach scenic check-in photos through the system photo picker.
dataCollection.storage: Stored locally on device as photo URIs associated with check-in records.

dataCollection.purpose: Send local notifications when new achievements are unlocked.
dataCollection.storage: Notification content is generated locally and not uploaded.
